name: workout-planner-ai
description: Create workout plans, track progress, suggest exercises, and calculate training volume.

tools.name: create_workout
tools.description: Create a complete workout plan based on goal, equipment, and difficulty level.

tools.name: track_progress
tools.description: Log a workout entry and view progress history for a given exercise.

tools.name: suggest_exercises
tools.description: Suggest exercises for a specific muscle group filtered by equipment and difficulty.

tools.name: calculate_volume
tools.description: Calculate total training volume and per-muscle breakdown. Each item needs 'name', 'muscle_group', 'weight', 'reps', 'sets'.
